text: Title: The Changing Entrepreneurial Landscape in the Digital Economy: Challenges, Opportunities and Strategies Entrepreneurship and innovation in the digital economy have been subject to tremendous changes as a result of the rapid developments in digital technologies, eroding in the process the existing borders and frameworks of traditional businesses and, thereby, creating new structures and challenges in business that need to be taken into account. In this study we applied a mixed methods research methodology including both qualitative and quantitative data that are derived from expert interviews and cases as well as quantitative analyses of a number of digital technologies including among others artificial intelligence, e-commerce, and data analysis that enable companies to overcome the challenges they encounter in their transition to digital economy. Through the analysis of digital technologies and entrepreneurial practices, this study contributes significantly to the knowledge of the challenges facing today’s entrepreneurs, and to their readiness in dealing with them; in addition to contributing to the identification of the key performance indicators for start-ups, as well as facilitating their access to global markets and assuring the sustainability of the digital economy transitions in the context of a globalised economy.
